pipelines.description: LLM pipeline: utcnow_addhours_timezone_logic (@utcNow with @addHours for timezone conversion nested in @formatDateTime with @if for DST handling and @concat for path building)

value.value: @concat(formatDateTime(addHours(utcNow(), if(equals(variables('isDST'), 'true'), int(pipeline().parameters.dstOffset), int(pipeline().parameters.standardOffset))), pipeline().parameters.outputFormat), '|', formatDateTime(addHours(utcNow(), if(equals(variables('isDST'), 'true'), int(pipeline().parameters.dstOffset), int(pipeline().parameters.standardOffset))), 'yyyy'), '|', formatDateTime(addHours(utcNow(), if(equals(variables('isDST'), 'true'), int(pipeline().parameters.dstOffset), int(pipeline().parameters.standardOffset))), 'MM'), '|', formatDateTime(addHours(utcNow(), if(equals(variables('isDST'), 'true'), int(pipeline().parameters.dstOffset), int(pipeline().parameters.standardOffset))), 'dd'), '|', formatDateTime(addHours(utcNow(), if(equals(variables('isDST'), 'true'), int(pipeline().parameters.dstOffset), int(pipeline().parameters.standardOffset))), 'HH'), '|', toLower(pipeline().parameters.targetTimezone), '|', string(mod(add(mul(int(formatDateTime(addHours(utcNow(), if(equals(variables('isDST'), 'true'), int(pipeline().parameters.dstOffset), int(pipeline().parameters.standardOffset))), 'HH')), 60), int(formatDateTime(addHours(utcNow(), if(equals(variables('isDST'), 'true'), int(pipeline().parameters.dstOffset), int(pipeline().parameters.standardOffset))), 'mm'))), 1440)))

@createArray(concat('segment_0|', split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[1], '|', string(mod(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[4]), 6)), '|', if(equals(mod(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[4]), 2), 0), 'even', 'odd')), concat('segment_1|', split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[2], '|', string(add(mod(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[4]), 6), 1)), '|', if(greater(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[4]), 12), 'pm', 'am')), concat('segment_2|', split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[3], '|', string(sub(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[1]), mod(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[1]), 4))), '|', toLower(pipeline().parameters.targetTimezone)), concat('segment_3|', split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[4], '|', string(div(mul(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[4]), 100), 24)), '|', variables('isDST')), concat('segment_4|', string(length(variables('outputPath'))), '|', string(mod(add(int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[6]), int(split(variables('convertedTimestamp'), '|')[4])), 360)), '|', if(contains(toLower(variables('outputPath')), 'fallback'), 'fallback', 'normal')))
